executionArgs.additionalInstruction: ABSOLUTELY CRITICAL: The POST /v1/chats response is a NESTED JSON object. To get the chat ID you MUST use: chat_id = response.json()['chat']['id']. DO NOT use response.json()['chat_id'] — that key DOES NOT EXIST. The response shape is: {"chat": {"id": "uuid", "title": "..."}}. GET /v1/chats returns {"items": [{"id": "..."}]}. POST /v1/chats/{chat_id}/engagement requires JSON body with item_id, viewer_id, session_id (all strings). Response: {"engagement": {"id": "..."}}.
